revision.comment: prevent misnested tags; poem tag can't contain lang template with block content inside it, but lang template can contain poem tags that contain block content. Tested in sandbox and on testcases page. The problem was occurring at [[Greek Aljamiado]].
revision.text:
{| class="Verse_transliteration-translation" {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}||style="margin-left:2em !important;"}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|{{{originalHeading}}}|}}{{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliteration heading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|
}}{{#if:{{{lang|}}}|
{{lang|{{{lang}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}}}|rtl={{{rtl|}}}}}
|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}|style={{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|"margin-left:1em;"}}}}}} | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{transliterationHeading|}}}|{{{transliterationHeading}}}}} {{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliterationHeading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|
}} {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|{{transl|{{{lang}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{{2}}}|style={{#if:{{{transliterationHeading|}}}|"margin-left:1em;"}}}}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{{2}}}|style={{#if:{{{transliterationHeading|}}}|"margin-left:1em;"}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{translationHeading|}}}|{{{translationHeading}}}}} {{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliterationHeading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|
}} {{#tag:poem|{{{3}}} |style={{#if:{{{translationHeading|}}}|"margin-left:1em;"}}}} |} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{| class="Verse_transliteration-translation" {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}||style="margin-left:2em !important;"}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|{{{originalHeading}}}|}}{{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliteration heading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{| class="Verse_transliteration-translation" {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}||style="margin-left:2em !important;"}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|{{{originalHeading}}}|}}{{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliteration heading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{| class="Verse_transliteration-translation" {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}||style="margin-left:2em !important;"}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|{{{originalHeading}}}|}}{{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliteration heading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|
}}{{#if:{{{lang|}}}|
{{lang|{{{lang}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}}}|rtl={{{rtl|}}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{| class="Verse_transliteration-translation" {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}||style="margin-left:2em !important;"}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|{{{originalHeading}}}|}}{{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliteration heading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{| class="Verse_transliteration-translation" {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}||style="margin-left:2em !important;"}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|{{{originalHeading}}}|}}{{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliteration heading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|
}}{{#if:{{{lang|}}}|
{{lang|{{{lang}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}}}|rtl={{{rtl|}}}}}
|{{#tag:poem|{{{1}}}|style={{#if:{{{originalHeading|}}}|"margin-left:1em;"}}}}}} | style="padding-right:1em" | {{#if:{{{transliterationHeading|}}}|{{{transliterationHeading}}}}} {{#if:{{{originalHeading|{{{transliterationHeading|{{{translationHeading|}}}}}}}}}|
